name: runar
description: TypeScript-to-Bitcoin Script compiler for BSV smart contracts

scripts.test:all: pnpm run test && pnpm run conformance:all && pnpm run examples:all && pnpm run e2e:all && pnpm run wallet-client:all
scripts.test:ci: pnpm run lint:silent-skips && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:all && RUNAR_INTEGRATION_STRICT=1 pnpm run integration:all && pnpm run lean:verify
scripts.conformance:ts: cd conformance && npx tsx runner/index.ts --tests-dir tests
scripts.conformance:rust: cd compilers/rust && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" cargo test --test compiler_tests
scripts.conformance:multi: cd conformance && npx tsx runner/index.ts --tests-dir tests --multi-format
scripts.conformance:multi:fold-on: cd conformance && RUNAR_DISABLE_CONSTANT_FOLDING=0 npx tsx runner/index.ts --tests-dir tests --multi-format
scripts.conformance:parser-only: cd conformance && npx tsx runner/index.ts --tests-dir tests --parser-only
scripts.conformance:all: pnpm run conformance:allowlist-audit && pnpm run conformance:ts && pnpm run conformance:go && pnpm run conformance:rust && pnpm run conformance:python && pnpm run conformance:zig && pnpm run conformance:ruby && pnpm run conformance:java && pnpm run conformance:parser-only && pnpm run conformance:multi && pnpm run conformance:multi:fold-on && pnpm run conformance:sdk && pnpm run conformance:anf-parity && pnpm run conformance:anf-parity:strict && pnpm run conformance:anf-parity:real-crypto
scripts.fuzz:ir:native: cd conformance && npx tsx fuzzer/index.ts --ir --hex --render native
scripts.examples:ts: npx vitest run examples/ts examples/sol examples/move
scripts.examples:all: pnpm run examples:ts && pnpm run examples:go && pnpm run examples:rust && pnpm run examples:python && pnpm run examples:zig && pnpm run examples:ruby && pnpm run examples:java
scripts.e2e:ruby: cd examples/end2end-example/ruby && bundle exec rspec price_bet_spec.rb --format documentation
scripts.e2e:all: pnpm run e2e:ts && pnpm run e2e:go && pnpm run e2e:rust && pnpm run e2e:python && pnpm run e2e:zig && pnpm run e2e:ruby && pnpm run e2e:java
scripts.integration:teranode: cd integration/go && NODE_TYPE=teranode go test -tags integration -v -timeout 600s
scripts.integration:teranode:run: cd integration && ./teranode.sh clean && ./teranode.sh start && cd go && NODE_TYPE=teranode go test -tags integration -v -timeout 600s; cd .. && ./teranode.sh stop
scripts.integration:python: cd integration/python && ([ -d .venv ] || (python3.13 -m venv .venv 2>/dev/null || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements.txt) && PYTHONPATH=../../compilers/python:../../packages/runar-py .venv/bin/pytest -v
scripts.integration:ruby: cd integration/ruby && bundle exec rspec --format documentation
scripts.wallet-client:ts: cd packages/runar-sdk && npx vitest run src/__tests__/wallet-client.spec.ts
scripts.wallet-client:ruby: cd integration/ruby && bundle exec rspec spec/wallet_client_spec.rb --format documentation
scripts.wallet-client:all: pnpm run wallet-client:ts && pnpm run wallet-client:go && pnpm run wallet-client:rust && pnpm run wallet-client:python && pnpm run wallet-client:zig && pnpm run wallet-client:ruby && pnpm run wallet-client:java
scripts.whitepaper: cd docs && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode runar-whitepaper.tex && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode runar-whitepaper.tex && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode runar-whitepaper.tex
